name: Dehradun
notes: Dehradun is a tier-2 city and the capital of Uttarakhand. It has a moderate cost of living compared to metro cities. Most student accommodations are along Mussoorie Road, Rajpur Road, and Clement Town areas. The city has a pleasant climate year-round. Auto-rickshaws are the most common mode of local transport. Vikram (shared autos) run on fixed routes at Rs 10-20 per ride.
